news.t: Single Stocks Are Driving the Tape – Direxion Launches Four 2X Bull ETFs

holdings.infoBox: UNHU is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 54.86%, Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 22.55%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 14.25%, United Health Swap at 13.97%, and United Health Swap at 13.41%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily UNH Bull 2X ETF (UNHU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the UnitedHealth Group Incorporated index. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, net fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of UnitedHealth Group, Inc. (NYSE: UNH) UNHU was launched on Mar 25, 2026 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Single Stocks Are Driving the Tape – Direxion Launches Four 2X Bull ETFs
data.text: New York, New York, March 25, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Direxion, a leading provider of Single Stock Leveraged & Inverse ETFs, today announced the launch of four new ETFs offering 2X daily exposure to ...
